body.notes: E-decision rationale: accelerate vs. deprecate-later. Ship clean. Single user (Igor). Mirrors D-protocol-clean-2026-04-15.
body.title: Remove lineage alias from announce-protocol v1 ship
body.result: Closed as side effect of profile.py slice 1. Profile shipped with zero lineage alias per E-decision. Design doc § 8.A updated to reflect this (TheIgors 32eccac7). No aliases.json, no router patch — lineage form raises AddressError.
body.description:
Deprecate lineage alias on announce-protocol v1 ship (not later). Per § 14 E-decision: 'if it breaks we fix it; it's a research project with one user'. Removes backwards-compat shim; simplifies profile schema.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/profile.py (NEW — created in sprint), ~/.agent_datacenter/aliases.json (NEW — referenced in design § 8.A but per E-decision NOT shipped), /home/akien/TheIgors/lab/design_docs/announce-protocol-design-2026-05-01-opus-pass.md (update §8.A to mark alias as not-shipped)
**Design rules:** ship-clean-no-aliasing-shims (§14 E-decision)
**Scope boundary:** in — exclude lineage alias from v1 announce code, update design doc to reflect E-decision; out — migration of any test fixtures still using lineage form (separate ticket if needed)
**Test plan:** verify announce parse/emit works without alias path; lineage-form input fails with clear AddressError; design doc § 8.A reflects E-decision (not 'alias don't replace')
